# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for our application stack including Redis. Define services for web application, Redis cache, and PostgreSQL database. Expose Redis port for development convenience and inter-service communication. This is for our containerized development environment.
# Category: redis_exposed_port

version: "3.9"

services:
  web:
    image: your-web-app:latest
    container_name: web
    depends_on:
      - redis
      - db
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    environment:
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
      DATABASE_HOST: db
      DATABASE_PORT: 5432
      DATABASE_NAME: appdb
      DATABASE_USER: appuser
      DATABASE_PASSWORD: apppassword
    volumes:
      - .:/app
    working_dir: /app
    command: sh -c "sleep infinity"

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data
    command: ["redis-server", "--appendonly", "yes"]

  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: appdb
      POSTGRES_USER: appuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: apppassword
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  redis-data:
  postgres-data:
